question: Who developed Skype?
sparql: PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> PREFIX res: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> SELECT ?uri WHERE { res:Skype dbo:developer ?uri }

question: Which people were born in Heraklion?
sparql: PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> PREFIX res: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> SELECT ?uri WHERE { ?uri dbo:birthPlace res:Heraklion }

question: Give me all cities in Germany.
sparql: PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> PREFIX res: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> SELECT ?uri WHERE { ?uri dbo:country res:Germany . ?uri a dbo:City }

question: Who is the author of the book Jurassic Park?
sparql: PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> PREFIX res: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> SELECT ?uri WHERE { res:Jurassic_Park_(novel) dbo:author ?uri }

question: Which mountains are higher than 8000 meters?
sparql: PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> SELECT ?uri WHERE { ?uri a dbo:Mountain . ?uri dbo:elevation ?elev . FILTER(?elev > 8000) }
